Have a nice day.
right.
Talk soon.
Take care.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between GrowthX and Oasis to discuss potential content marketing collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Oasis (Series A, 80+ employees) seeks help with content strategy, production, and brand differentiation in a crowded market](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-powered content marketing services, including strategy, production, and LLM visibility tracking](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes an 8-week strategy sprint ($20K) followed by ongoing daily content production](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [Potential concerns around competitive conflicts and integration with existing tools (e.g., Ahrefs) to be addressed](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)

## Topics

### Oasis Background and Challenges

  - [Series A company with \~85 employees and small marketing team (1 PMM, 1 demand gen, 1 event manager)](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Struggling to stand out in crowded market; everyone copying similar messaging](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Current content efforts: weekly blog posts, but reactive and lacking strategic approach](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Need help with content strategy, production, and brand differentiation](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)

### GrowthX Offering Overview

  - [End-to-end AI-powered content marketing service](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Process includes creating company context artifacts, audience mapping, and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [AI-assisted content production with human editing and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Focus on LLM visibility factors (well-researched, attributed, structured content)](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [Tracking of SEO traffic, organic traffic, and LLM referrals](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)

### Engagement Model and Pricing

  - [8-week strategy sprint for $20,000 (one-time fee)](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [Includes artifact creation, content strategy, opportunity identification, and calibration](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [Aim to publish daily content by week 5-6](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
  - [Ongoing engagement after sprint (pricing not specified)](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)

### Potential Concerns and Clarifications

  - [Competitive conflicts: GrowthX uses separate pods and maintains strict information separation](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Integration with existing tools (e.g., Ahrefs): GrowthX prefers to use their own platform for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [SLAs and responsiveness: Highly responsive during work hours, balance between reactive and planned work](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
  - [Content types: Focus on website content (evergreen, thought leadership, informational) rather than product announcements or presentations](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to add Oasis to shared Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=1992.0)
  - [Share sample SOW (Statement of Work) and additional resources](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=1992.0)
  - [Provide potential start dates (typically 4-6 weeks out)](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=2002.0)
  - [Oasis to discuss internally regarding legal/IP concerns with competitive landscape](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
  - [Consider GrowthX's proposal and determine if it aligns with Oasis' needs and resources](https://fathom.video/share/uy5mpsibz1jvLK49Nk5qs4DRzDBx6uBF?tab=summary&timestamp=2022.0)

action_items.description: Discuss w/ Head of Ops re legal implications of GrowthX engagement (IP, competitor concerns)
Evaluate GrowthX 8-wk strategy sprint ($20k) vs current needs/resources
